description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with clean white walls and a flat black roof. It is surrounded by a spacious wraparound deck with white railings, providing ample outdoor space on all sides. The structure has two stories, with the upper level set back and featuring a balcony area. Large windows and glass doors dominate the front and rear facades, allowing for plenty of natural light. A set of exterior stairs is visible on one side, leading from the lower deck to the upper balcony. The overall appearance is minimalist and contemporary, with a focus on geometric lines and open outdoor living.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat black roof, large windows, and a wraparound deck with white railings. The design is minimalist and features spacious outdoor areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass doors, and the central upper story with balcony.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the exterior staircase, side windows, and the extended deck area.
description_view_2: Rear view with large windows and doors, and the upper story set back from the lower level.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a blue-framed door, side windows, and the deck's angular extension.
attribute_window_arrangement: large windows in symmetrical rows with some asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide glass door, flush with the deck, and is framed by large windows; no steps or overhangs are present.
